qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_req as oi_req, t0.c_req as c_req, t0.d_req as d_req, t0.ca_estado as ca_estado, t0.f_req as f_req, t0.c_tipo_req as c_tipo_req, t0.d_consultora as d_consultora, t0.f_alta as f_alta, t0.f_anulacion as f_anulacion, SEC.policy, t0.c_req as CODE, t0.d_req as TEXT, t0.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, t0.oi_req_preced as oi_req_preced FROM SEL02_REQ as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_req LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_req asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_req as oi_req, SEC.policy FROM SEL02_REQ as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_req LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_req asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Es la fecha de Creacion del Requerimiento
attribute.label: Fecha
attribute.name: f_req

assosiation.description: Registra los datos de las Referencias de un Requerimiento.
assosiation.label: Referencias
assosiation.name: REFERENCIAS

assosiation.label: Motivo de Solicitud por Requerimiento

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL02_REQ.oi_req) as CNT from SEL02_REQ Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REQ.oi_req={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL02_REQ.d_req,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL02_REQ.c_req,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REQ.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL02_COSTOS_REQ.oi_costo_req) as CNT from SEL02_COSTOS_REQ Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL02_COSTOS_REQ.oi_costo_req={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL02_COSTOS_REQ.oi_costo_req,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL02_COSTOS_REQ.oi_costo_req,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? assosiation.label: Motivo de Solicitud por Referencia

assosiation.label: Personal Inscripto
assosiation.name: REF_PER

assosiation.description: Registra los postulantes que se inscribieron a la Referencia.
assosiation.label: Postulantes Inscriptos
assosiation.name: REF_POST

assosiation.label: Examenes a Realizar por Referencia

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REFERENCIA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REFERENCIA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia) as CNT from SEL02_REFERENCIAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL02_REFERENCIAS.d_referencia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL02_REFERENCIAS.c_referencia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_req={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

method.description: Hace el Reclutamiento Interno para un puesto
method.name: ReclutamientoInternoPuesto

method.description: calucula el ranking de todos los de personal que han pasado los filtros
method.name: RankingReclutamientoInternoPuesto

method.description: Hace el Reclutamiento externo para un puesto
method.name: ReclutamientoExternoPuesto

method.description: calucula el ranking de todos los de personal que han pasado los filtros
method.name: RankingReclutamientoExternoPuesto
Nueva
method.description: Prepara los datos de la referencia en función del puesto de la misma

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PAR.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS AS PAR WHERE PAR.c_modulo = \'SDP\' and par.c_parametro = \'WebName\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT PAR.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS AS PAR WHERE PAR.c_modulo = \'SDP\' and par.c_parametro = \'WebURLPublica\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL01_POSTULANTE.oi_postulante, SEL01_POSTULANTE.d_postulante, SEL01_POSTULANTE.d_nombre, SEL01_POSTULANTE.d_email FROM SEL01_POSTULANTE, SEL13_RECLUTADOS JOIN SEL01_POSTULANTE.oi_postulante INNER SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_postulante WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado = {#SOURCE:@oi_reclutado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER01_PERSONAL.d_email FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, SEL13_RECLUTADOS JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado = {#SOURCE:@oi_reclutado} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <DATOS oi_referencia="1" postulados="1" pondPostulacion="0" pondInscripcion="0" ignorarCursos="0" ignorarEstudios="0" ignorarIdiomas="0" ignorarExperiencia="0" ignorarReferencia="0" oi_empresa="1" oi_req="50" ignorarAreas="" ignorarPostulacion=""> <ROWS /> </DATOS>
resource.name: QRY_POSTU
resource.description: Devuelve todos los IDs de oi_personal que corresponden a las personas de la empresa que no estan muertas ni jubiladas

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SEL02_REF_PER.oi_personal_emp FROM SEL02_REF_PER WHERE SEL02_REF_PER.oi_referencia = {#SOURCE:@oi_referencia} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia as ID_REF, SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia as ID, SEL02_REQ.c_req as COD, SEL02_REQ.d_req as DES, SEL02_REQ.oi_empresa as PARENT from SEL02_REQ, SEL02_REFERENCIAS join SEL02_REQ.oi_req INNER SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_req Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID_REF={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REQ.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL02_REQ.oi_req) as CNT from SEL02_REQ Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REQ.oi_req={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL02_REQ.d_req,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL02_REQ.c_req,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REQ.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL02_REF_POST.oi_ref_post) as CNT from SEL02_REF_POST Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REF_POST.oi_ref_post={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

assosiation.description: Sirve para Cargar los resultados posibles de los examenes definidos por referencia.
assosiation.label: Resultados de Examenes por Referencia
assosiation.name: REF_RES_EXA

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REF_EXAMEN.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REF_EXAMEN.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL02_REF_EXAMEN.oi_ref_examen) as CNT from SEL02_REF_EXAMEN, SEL07_EXAMENES join SEL02_REF_EXAMEN.OI_EXAMEN inner SEL07_EXAMENES.OI_EXAMEN Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REF_EXAMEN.oi_ref_examen={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL07_EXAMENES.d_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL07_EXAMENES.c_examen,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REF_EXAMEN.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Sirve para Cargar los resultados posibles de los examenes definidos por referencia.
class.label: Resultados de Examen por Referencia
class.name: REF_RES_EXA

qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Requerimientos.REF_RES_EXA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL02_REF_RES_EXA.oi_ref_res_exa) as CNT from SEL02_REF_RES_EXA, SEL08_RESULTADOS join SEL02_REF_RES_EXA.OI_RESULTADO inner SEL08_RESULTADOS.OI_RESULTADO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REF_RES_EXA.oi_ref_res_exa={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL08_RESULTADOS.d_resultado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL08_RESULTADOS.c_resultado,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEL02_REF_RES_EXA.oi_ref_examen={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
